title: thelypteris eriosorus
intro: Thelypteris eriosorus, also known as the cleft spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. Thelypteris eriosorus can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
